chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-592 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on CMA No.1912/2026 2. For order on CMA No.1913/2026 3. For hearing of CMA No.2720/2022 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2026. Mr. Shahzad, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Akbar, A.A.G. --------------- 1. Granted. 2-4. CMA No.1913/2026 is one under Order 23 Rule 1 CPC seeking unconditional withdrawal of the Petition. The same stands allowed, with the result that the Petition stands dismissed as withdrawn along with other pending miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
